calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jan-18-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Petitioner PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. Claimant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
